name: Fidacy — Payment Firewall
description: A signed, independently-verifiable verdict on every money-moving agent action. Blocks wrong/lookalike payee, over-cap, and duplicate-invoice fraud before money moves. Non-custodial, local-first, deny-by-default.

engineApiKey.description: Fidacy engine API key (fky_live_/fky_test_) enabling signed verdicts via assess_action. Falls back to FIDACY_ENGINE_API_KEY.

engineUrl.description: Fidacy engine base URL. Defaults to https://api.fidacy.com (or FIDACY_ENGINE_URL).

subject.description: Mandate subject identity for this agent. Defaults to agent:demo (or FIDACY_SUBJECT).

engineApiKey.label: Engine API key
engineApiKey.help: Optional. Enables signed trust verdicts (assess_action) from the live Fidacy engine.
